infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Fika needs your location to find nearby rides, show your position on the map, and track your trip in real time.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Fika needs background location access so drivers can keep sharing their location during an active ride, even when the app isn't in the foreground.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Fika needs camera access so you can take photos for ride verification, KYC documents, and your vehicle profile.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Fika accesses your photos to let you upload profile pictures, vehicle photos, and documents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Fika needs permission to save trip receipts and shared images to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Fika needs microphone access to record audio during SOS emergency alerts.

plugins.photosPermission: The app accesses your photos to let you share them with your vehicle profile.
plugins.cameraPermission: Fika needs camera access so you can take photos for ride verification, KYC documents, and your vehicle profile.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Fika needs your location to find nearby rides and show your position on the map.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Fika needs background location access so drivers can keep sharing their location during an active ride.

plugins.microphonePermission: Fika needs microphone access to record audio during SOS emergency alerts.
